report.summary: Community growth cycle v10: identified ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide and crypto-tax-guide-2026 as net-new pages since v9; drafted 7-post Ethereum Pectra Twitter thread (25-days-to-mainnet + EIP-7702 smart accounts angle), BTC volatility DCA tweet, 270-pages milestone tweet, April 15 tax countdown tweet; Discord/Telegram announcement with two-guide drop; Thursday newsletter with Pectra as lead story and live data teaser; created 2 SVG social cards (270-pages milestone + DCA calculator) saved to /public/.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (7 posts): Ethereum Pectra — hook on 'biggest Ethereum upgrade since the Merge'; Prague + Electra dual-layer upgrade explained; EIP-7702 smart accounts (gas abstraction, batched approvals, one-click DeFi); EIP-7251 validator max balance 32 ETH → 2,048 ETH; EIP-7691 blob doubling for L2 fee compression; mainnet timing (~April 10) and what to watch; CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide
Tweet: DCA Calculator + BTC volatility — $71K uncertainty angle; any asset, any interval, historical simulations; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator
Tweet: 270 pages milestone — quiet milestone framing; Bloomberg Terminal of crypto for everyone; brand credibility signal
Tweet: April 15 tax countdown — 31 days to US deadline; Q4 extension passed today (Mar 15); every swap/yield/NFT taxable; CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026
Discord/Telegram announcement: Ethereum Pectra guide + Crypto Tax Guide 2026 drop with direct URLs; both free, no login
Discord/Telegram teaser: Sprint 58 live data teaser — replacing mock data with DefiLlama live feeds on Bloomberg Screener; anticipation build for community

Newsletter section (Thursday send): BTC market pulse ($71K + Pectra mainnet countdown); Pectra guide as lead story (EIP-7702 UX unlock angle); Tax Guide 2026 (April 15 urgency); Coming Soon: live DefiLlama data on Bloomberg Screener; Degen Corner on EIP-7702 gas abstraction and which protocols ship it first; 3 subject line variants provided

Posting schedule: Sunday PM 270-pages milestone tweet + Discord Pectra/Tax announce → Monday DCA+BTC tweet + Live Data teaser Discord → Tuesday Pectra thread (7 posts) → Wednesday Tax countdown tweet → Thursday Newsletter → Friday community engagement poll

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-270-pages-milestone.svg — 1200×630 social card: hero '270+' number with indigo-cyan-green gradient and glow filter; content breakdown bar chart (Tools 92, Learn Guides 78, Comparisons 54, DeFi Trackers 31, Exchanges 15+) in glass-morphism right panel; four category pills (Tools/Learn/Compare/DeFi); 'Always Free' + 'No Sign-Up' badges; brand tagline 'The Bloomberg Terminal of crypto — for everyone'; dark #080d1c background. Saved to /public/social-270-pages-milestone.svg

social-dca-calculator.svg — 1200×630 social card: live DCA simulation chart (BTC $100/week × 24 months) with price path, dashed cost-basis line, and green profit-zone shading; result stats strip (Invested $10,400 → Value $38,700 → Return +272.1% → Avg Buy $32,100); weekly DCA buy tick marks on X axis; four feature bullets (100+ assets, custom intervals, DCA vs lump-sum, cost basis viz); CTA pill; dark background. Saved to /public/social-dca-calculator.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 16 — GSC organic signals expected today or tomorrow (day 14-21 window for new sites); this is the critical credibility window
Net-new pages for v10 sourced from publish report: /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide and /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 — both promoted from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES on Mar 16
PUBLISH_QUEUE is now empty — next content batch requires scaffolding new pages; Sprint 58 pipeline includes 6 items with DeFiLlama Live API as lead

Ethereum Pectra scored 90/100: ~25-day countdown creates urgency; EIP-7702 smart accounts is the most differentiated angle vs. generic upgrade coverage; query clusters include 'ethereum pectra upgrade', 'eip-7702 explained', 'ethereum 2026 upgrade', 'eth pectra mainnet date', 'smart wallet ethereum'

Crypto Tax Guide 2026 scored 89/100: Q4 extension passed today creates urgency signal; 31-day countdown to April 15 is peak search intent window; query clusters include 'crypto tax 2025', 'bitcoin taxes 2026', 'defi yield tax', 'nft tax guide', 'crypto capital gains'
270-pages milestone tweet is a brand credibility play — no page link needed, purpose is social proof and platform positioning
DCA Calculator remains highest-traffic evergreen tool; BTC at ~$71K with high uncertainty is the strongest possible amplification context for DCA content
Sprint 58 live data teaser (DefiLlama Bloomberg Screener) planted in Discord and newsletter — builds anticipation, drives return visits when it ships
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-15-social-drafts-v10.md
Social cards saved to /public/social-270-pages-milestone.svg and /public/social-dca-calculator.svg
Existing cards confirmed valid and ready: /public/social-ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide.svg and /public/social-crypto-tax-guide-2026.svg (both previously created, on-brand)
Posting schedule: Sunday PM milestone tweet + Discord announce → Monday DCA tweet + live-data teaser → Tuesday Pectra thread → Wednesday Tax countdown → Thursday Newsletter → Friday community poll
